title: How to Index String Fields For Faceted Search
description:
You can use the MongoDB Search stringFacet type to index string fields for faceting, which allows you
to run a faceted navigation operator query on that field. MongoDB Search doesn't apply the analyzer
when indexing string fields for faceting.
